description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:stable Docker image with a docker:dind service, sets the DOCKER_DRIVER to overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST to tcp://docker:2375/, and runs a before_script executing `docker info` and `apk --no-cache add make`. Define a single stage named build and add a job called build-master in that stage that is limited to the master branch. In the build-master job run `docker login -u \"$CI_REGISTRY_USER\" -p \"$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD\"`, then `docker build -t thereference/drupal-kubernetes-builder:latest .`, and finally `docker push thereference/drupal-kubernetes-builder:latest`.
